nasb.text: and all of you armed men cross over the Jordan before the Lord until He has driven His enemies out from before Him,

esv.text: and every armed man of you will pass over the Jordan before the Lord, until he has driven out his enemies from before him

cnv.text: 你們所有武裝起來的人，都要在耶和華面前過約旦河，直到他把他的仇敵從自己面前趕出去，

ccb.text: 你们全军就要在耶和华面前渡过约旦河，直到祂赶走祂面前的仇敌，
